title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates!
